content:
Ok this is going to sound stupid.. I have a camping trip coming up that was just a female friend and I. I was really looking forward to it but I had lingering doubts that we would be able to stay out of each other's pants. I was manifesting the ability to say no if either of us felt the urge to make a move on the other. I think it worked because I felt compelled to cancel the trip... 
The situation is obviously more nuanced than I'm making it out to be here so if anyone reading this feels like jumping to conclusions, please talk to me first. 
This feels like one of those "universe works in mysterious ways" kind of events. I guess it answered my call even if it wasn't in the way I hoped for. It's made me believe even stronger in manifestation as a practice. I don't think it's a monkey's paw scenario but more like finding the path of least resistance to grant the wish. I'm coming into this realization with curiosity and acceptance rather than resentment. Trying to evaluate why this is the path chosen and how I can grow from here. I don't want to "be careful what you wish for". I'm confident that what I want is what I want even if the how impacts my other desires.
